description: ImapInboxSourceComponent — fetch emails from an IMAP server.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var containing the mailbox username (typically the email address).

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var containing the password (for Gmail use an app password).

mailbox.label: Mailbox
mailbox.description: IMAP folder to read from. Common: INBOX, '[Gmail]/All Mail', Archive.

max_messages.label: Max Messages
max_messages.description: Cap on how many messages to fetch in a single run.

mark_read.label: Mark Read
mark_read.description: After fetching, set the \Seen flag on each message so the next UNSEEN run skips them. Set False to leave unread (useful for testing).

include_body_html.label: Include Body Html
include_body_html.description: Emit the raw HTML body too (in addition to text). Off by default — adds bulk.

fallback_html_to_text.label: Fallback Html To Text
fallback_html_to_text.description: If a message has only HTML body, derive a text body by stripping tags.

name: Imap Inbox Source
